message:
chore: expand gitignore with beads recovery, clippy variants, UBS JSON, and scratch files

Add ignore rules for ephemeral artifacts from multi-agent sessions:

- .beads/.br_recovery/ (auto-generated beads recovery directories)
- clippy_*.json, clippy_*.txt (clippy output beyond existing patterns)
- *_clippy.json (e.g. window_clippy.json from per-crate analysis)
- check_out.json (cargo check/clippy analysis output)
- ubs_*.json (UBS JSON output; text output was already covered)
- /env (ephemeral env file at repo root)
- /dump_sender.rs (scratch Rust file from debugging sessions)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -171,3 +171,23 @@ tmp_re_test/
 .opencode.json.*
 .windsurf.mcp.json.*
 .claude/settings.local.json
+
+# Beads recovery directories
+.beads/.br_recovery/
+
+# Clippy analysis output (all variants)
+clippy_*.json
+clippy_*.txt
+*_clippy.json
+
+# Check/build analysis output
+check_out.json
+
+# UBS scan output (JSON)
+ubs_*.json
+
+# Ephemeral env file at repo root
+/env
+
+# Agent-generated scratch Rust files at repo root
+/dump_sender.rs
